title: Fuel Injector Coding / Calibration Value Programming
description: Program per-injector compensation codes into ECU after injector replacement on diesel and selected direct-injection gasoline systems.
physical_solution: Write per-injector IMA/correction codes to ECU so it compensates for individual injector flow variance. Required after any injector replacement.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — $2E write accessible on some OEMs. Security access ($27) required on most. OEM DID map needed per platform.
preconditions: New injector codes physically available (printed on injector body or packaging)
Engine not started after injector swap until codes written

procedure_steps.description: Record IMA/correction code from each new injector before installation. Codes are 6-16 characters printed on injector.
Security access if required: $27 [LEVEL] then respond to seed with correct key
Write injector code to cylinder DID: $2E [CYL_DID] [CODE_BYTES]. Repeat for each replaced injector.
Read back codes via $22 [CYL_DID] to confirm correct values written.
Start engine. Monitor fuel trims and idle quality. Clear DTCs and confirm no return.

oem_notes.Ford: Power Stroke diesels: ICP/injector codes entered via IDS. DID map varies by ECM generation.
oem_notes.GM: Duramax: GDS2 injector balance rate display. Coding path via SPS on some platforms.
oem_notes.BMW: IMA codes (6-digit) written to DME via ISTA. DID per cylinder well documented.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: VCDS adaptation channels per cylinder. ODIS guided function on common-rail TDI.
oem_notes.Toyota: Diesel market (HiLux/Land Cruiser): injector compensation via Techstream/Denso.
oem_notes.Nissan: Common-rail diesel: CONSULT III+ injector code entry.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: CRDi diesel: GDS injector quantity adjustment path.
oem_notes.Stellantis: VM Motori/Cummins diesels in RAM/Jeep. SGW may block on 2018+ — attempt pre-2018 first.
